title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Command Center
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM scroll and decision friction by adding a browser-local command center to the Project Miner intake workbench, while preserving that it is derived synthesis only and not a new export, handoff artifact, approval, persistence, import, issue, task, work authorization, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking write, hosted parity proof, or production mutation.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Command-Center Implementer
implemented_scope: Add a Local PM Intake Command Center panel near the top of /pm-review/import-intake.

Derive the command center from the existing import exception register, review checklist, local decision draft, field prep queue, executor closeout checklist, field questions draft, field observation scratchpad, approval-persistence readiness gates, and admission plan.
Show the current local PM move, next field-question posture, handoff context, and still-blocked future authority.
Add Command Center to the existing PM Intake Quick Jump Rail.

Add focused smoke coverage for command-center rendering, link targets, initial and updated derived text, no new localStorage key, exact four read seams, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for command-center scope review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "selected recipient|handoff created|assigned|scheduled|ready for execution|ready for field|field ready|field log of record|hosted parity proven|approval ready|packet admitted|daily report|tracking system|percent complete|released|cleared|approved|accepted|authorized|go/no-go passed|dispatch|dispatched|customer confirmed|JHA complete|LOTO approved|material released|issue created|task created|work order|production-ready" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
PM command-center wording scan passed with no matches.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
